Notice Of Motion To Compel Depositions Of Matt Corvi And The Person Most Knowledgeable Of Mayes Oyster Houses Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. MICHAEL RAIFSNIDER, Esq. (tel: 415-398-9001) for Plaintiff.
Atty. LYNN FIORENTINO, Esq. of Arentfox Schiff LLP (tel: 415-757-5500) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF SUNJIN & POLK INC.'s Motion To Compel Depositions Of Matt Corvi And The Person Most Knowledgeable Of Mayes Oyster Houses Accounting.

Plaintiff contests the tentative ruling. Both parties stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem and authorize the clerk to sign the stipulation on their behalf. Matter argued and submitted. The Court orders the parties to meet and confer as to the issues pertaining to this motion, and inform Judge Pro Tem Scott Borrowman as to any agreements. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (525/JPT)

DEMURRER to Amended ANSWER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance

Noah Woo Esq., Arentfox Schieff LLP, 415-75-5500, via zoom for cross complainaint.

No other appearances

Mr. Woo contests to the tentative. The declaration of Lynn Floriotino is reviewed.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Cross-Complainant's Demurrer to Amended Answer to Cross-Complaint is OFF CALENDAR.
